% https://q.uiver.app/#
\documentclass[tikz]{standalone}
\usepackage{quiver}
\begin{document}
\begin{tikzcd}
	&& \Sigma && \\
	{S^1} &&&& {S^1} \\
	&& {\Sigma'}
	\arrow["f", from=1-3, to=3-3]
	\arrow["{\gamma_-}", hook, from=2-1, to=1-3]
	\arrow["{\gamma'_{-}}"', hook', from=2-1, to=3-3]
	\arrow["{\gamma_+}"', hook', from=2-5, to=1-3]
	\arrow["{\gamma'_{+}}", hook, from=2-5, to=3-3]
\end{tikzcd}
\end{document}
